item.title: Doctor Creates Pakistan’s First Insulin Patch System For Diabetic Patients
item.description: Led by Dr. Talha Durrani from Peshawar’s Khyber Teaching Hospital (KTH), a team of doctors, engineers, and data scientists, has indigenously developed a painless insulin delivery device using transdermal patches. If produced on a large scale, the device has the potential to replace the traditional injections/pens used to inject insulin into the body. Sauce: https://propakistani.pk/2022/02/14/doctor-creates-pakistans-first-insulin-patches-for-diabetic-patients/
item.dc:creator: PoorSucker

item.title: They've declared war on women, let's strike back.
item.description: I keep seeing posts of new and more biologically and medically ignorant state laws passing like hotcakes on a cold day. The worst part of so many of these laws is that they are absolutely death sentences for commonplace medical issues during many pregnancies. Ectopic Pregnancies, miscarriages that result in not all of the fetus passing, septic uterus... far too many necessary medical issues are lumped under the umbrella of abortion and will be criminalized forcing women to go without proper needful care. Meaning many women absolutely will die unnecessarily in the coming months and possibly years. We should begin an initiative, a class?-action suit, whatever it takes to sue the states and lawmakers pushing for these death-laws.
item.dc:creator: Aelonwy

item.title: Down another 10 lbs! ?
item.description:
I had to come back and update on my progress!!! Another 10 lbs down!!30 lbs total. 30/5'7/227 lbs first pic 207 lbs second pic, 197 third pic. Goal 160 lbs. Just some good ole calorie counting and walking on the treadmill 1 hour a day 4 days a week! Almost halfway there?
Start of my journey and now?
item.dc:creator: myingenioususername

item.title: Did this. Worked with Comcast. Gave me two years worth of credit.
item.description: I called Comcast and told them I wanted Fox removed. They said it was a core channel and couldn’t be removed so I demanded to not pay for it. I was given a 2 year credit for the cost of the single channel. Only about $20 per year but it’s not about the money, it’s about sending a message. Front page edit: YAY, front page. The main question is who still has cable: and I still have cable so I can record sports, watch on my schedule and watch without commercials. Nothing like watching an NFL game in 47 min. If someone has a way I can watch sports not live on a streaming service or internet I’m all ears.
item.dc:creator: SchenectadySlumlord

item.title: Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Day 194)
item.description:
Welcome to the 194th edition in this series, let's do some good today. Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Day 193) https://imgur.com/gallery/zUNZTnO Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Day 192) https://imgur.com/gallery/ef4CV1o Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Day 191) https://imgur.com/gallery/Cg6iteN Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Days 181-190) https://imgur.com/a/g3sTR0J Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Days 171-180) https://imgur.com/a/7OnodoA Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Days 161-170) https://imgur.com/a/3SfMNfg Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Days 151-160) https://imgur.com/a/a3npRvx Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Days 100-150) https://imgur.com/a/rdkioD9 Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (First 100 days) https://imgur.com/a/SGVY2vD
Be someone that somebody remembers
PJ looking at MrsPuckett
Be a bottle of water.
Only 4 days left in my fundraiser for Nashville Humane. If you'd like to help them continue rescuing dogs like The Pucketts, check out my link below https://www.classy.org/fundraiser/3793511 ... Have a beautiful day everyone, see you soon
item.dc:creator: MrPuckett
